item1.question: How long does it take to receive my commission payment?
item1.answer: Commissions are processed and paid within 3-5 business days after the candidate successfully completes their work period. You can request a payout anytime, and we'll process it in our next payout cycle.

item2.question: What is the minimum amount I need to have to request a payout?
item2.answer: There is no minimum payout amount. You can request a payout for any amount greater than 0 VND. However, for bank transfer efficiency, we recommend requesting payouts when you have accumulated at least 500,000 VND.

item3.question: Can I increase my commission rate?
item3.answer: Your commission rate is determined based on your tier and performance. As you make more successful referrals, you may qualify for a higher commission rate. Contact our support team to discuss tier upgrades.
